_comment: Admin-curated highlights from the anonymous community board. Hand-populated — copy great posts here when you spot them. Schema per entry: text (string, the post body), monika (string, the original poster's monika), topic (string, used to group/filter — e.g. 'Medication', 'Coping', 'Mania', 'Depression', 'Relationships', 'Work'), addedAt (ISO 8601 string).
